title: Payment of damages
doc_html:
§3727.  Payment of damages

Damages for the servitude taken or damages to any owner, may be paid by the municipality out of any general or special fund which may be provided for that purpose.
doc_text:
§3727.  Payment of damages
Damages for the servitude taken or damages to any owner, may be paid by the municipality out of any general or special fund which may be provided for that purpose.
